summary: Created context.py - a context gathering CLI that replaces regex-based inference with LLM semantic reasoning. All four commands implemented: action-check, completion-check, next-step, extract-tasks. Helper functions include: load_session_state, get_conversation_summary, scan_for_deliveries, get_recent_task_activity, extract_first_message, get_active_tasks. NO INFERENCE - only gathers and formats context for AI reasoning.
notes_for_orchestrator: All commands tested and producing valid JSON output. Import pattern matches existing scripts (briefing.py, db.py) for consistency. Helper functions are internal (not CLI-exposed) as specified. Ready for D2.2 integration with LLM reasoning layer.
